visualImpact.screenshotEvidence: Desktop and tablet center an editorial Fraunces question over a precise flight-grid field; the asymmetric progress line and restrained blue signal create a recognizable product entrance.
visualImpact.critique: The restrained composition is intentionally quieter than a marketing hero, but it is polished and clearly not a generic dashboard shell.

sourceAlignment.screenshotEvidence: The two-choice decision pattern, direct product language, segmented profile controls, and Lucide cloud treatment are visible across onboarding, Cloud Preview, and the adaptive shell browser captures.
sourceAlignment.critique: The built SPA cannot expose runtime component markers through a static index.html audit; Playwright runtime evidence and source markers verify adoption instead.
sourceAlignment.requiredIteration: Teach the audit adapter to render SPA routes before checking component markers.

brandFit.screenshotEvidence: Corvus uses an editorial serif voice, technical mono metadata, a flight-path grid, and explicit Local authority language consistently across desktop and mobile.
brandFit.critique: The visual system feels trustworthy and capable without inheriting a developer-tool chrome for Everyday users.

conversionClarity.screenshotEvidence: Step 1 presents exactly two work-style choices, disabled Back/Continue states are obvious, and later runtime copy distinguishes ready Local from Cloud Preview before any connection is attempted.
conversionClarity.critique: The primary decision and safe next action are unmistakable at all audited widths.

mobilePolish.screenshotEvidence: At 390x844 the headline reflows without clipping, choice cards become a deliberate vertical stack, and the local shell uses a purpose-built bottom navigation, profile sheet, and full-screen inspector.
mobilePolish.critique: Mobile is designed as a separate interaction mode rather than a collapsed desktop rail.
mobilePolish.requiredIteration: Add a compact project picker to the mobile More sheet in a later information-architecture refinement.

motionTaste.screenshotEvidence: Browser evidence records the 520ms onboarding arrival animation in a finished state and confirms prefers-reduced-motion support; choice hover/selection transitions remain brief and functional.
motionTaste.critique: Motion is intentionally sparse and supports orientation rather than decoration.

genericnessPenalty.screenshotEvidence: The flight-grid field, editorial typography, capability-aware language, and four profile-specific navigation models avoid the common card-stack SaaS template.
genericnessPenalty.critique: Standard form cards are used only where their familiarity improves the onboarding decision.
